---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Explain why this feature would be useful and what problem it solves.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like, including:

- API design (if applicable)
- Expected behavior
- Configuration options (if any)

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references to papers, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the motivation and use case
- [ ] I have considered alternative approaches
